_comment: Add this block to opencode.json (project-local) or ~/.config/opencode/opencode.json (global). Restart opencode after editing. Replace the placeholder paths with your actual values. On a pip install, 'kuckuck' expands to the console script; with the release binary, it expands to the downloaded kuckuck_<os> executable renamed to 'kuckuck' on PATH. Legacy pip installs using the 'kuckuck-mcp' console-script alias still work; binary users only get the 'kuckuck' command (no separate kuckuck-mcp binary exists in the current release).
